content.en:
They didn't know Ye Tian, but after a little investigation, they knew Ye Tian's situation.

It's just that the rules of the Abyss of Aromu are special, even if it is an ancient demon-level existence, there is no way to deduce everything about Ye Tian with a finger, not to mention their emperor-level existences, they only know that Ye Tian comes from a tribe that is not very powerful.

But why such a weak tribe would give birth to such a demonic emperor-level existence, then they were very puzzled.

From the current information, it can be known that Ye Tian has the strength to kill the top emperor.

In the case that the ancient demon level could not participate in the battle, it was really too difficult to kill an emperor-level existence like Ye Tian.

meeting.

Many emperors discussed how to kill Ye Tian.

"That emperor-level existence named Heaven, what should I do with him?"

"Either multiple emperor-level people besiege him, or let a powerful emperor-level kill him~!"

"We can't be sure what the opponent's strength is at the moment, and if we don't know it well, if the first attack fails, he will be vigilant and even withdraw from the battle. "

"Everyone has their opinions, and then choose the one with the highest degree of agreement. "

These emperors have been discussed, but many opinions are not suitable.

And at this moment, an emperor-level walked in from outside.

"Don't discuss it, that emperor level named Heaven, I'll kill him!"

Seeing this emperor, many emperors were overjoyed.

"It's you, it's you, why are you here?"

Many emperors were shocked, Wei Nai was the legendary emperor-level existence, but on a larger battlefield, but he didn't expect to come here now.

Wei sat on the most important throne and spoke, "Lord Golden Slayer Ancient Demon transferred me back from that battlefield. I came back this time to kill all the emperors of the dragon tribe and let them lose this war. The mere dragon disciple tribe dares to threaten the status of our Golden God Department, it is simply looking for death!!"

"Hahahaha, Wei is back, then we can rest assured, just one day, it can't be Wei Wei's opponent!"

"Yes, Wei Wei's strength is almost emperor-level invincible, and he even has a record of escaping from the hands of the ancient demon level, just an emperor-level from a medium tribe will definitely be killed by Wei in seconds!"

These emperors touted Wei one after another, and although Wei had never seen Ye Tian, he didn't take Ye Tian seriously.

In the territory of the Golden God Ministry, he really didn't take any emperor level to heart, for him, the real opponent came from some emperor-level existences outside the territory of the Golden God Ministry.

"Lock me in the sky!"

Wei commanded.

"Yes!"

Many emperors of the Golden God Department responded one after another.

......

Airplanes!

There was a faint vibration of the ultimate particles around him, maybe the others didn't care about this change, but Ye Tian felt that something was wrong.

It stands to reason that the ultimate particle is very stable, and it will not oscillate unless it is a battle or some other special situation.

Either this place is special and the ultimate particles are unstable, or this place is affected by a force, such as some kind of weapon locking onto this place, causing the final particles here to vibrate.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the Dapeng Technique to quickly retreat and came to another place, and the ultimate particle here also shook immediately.

At this moment, Ye Tian was completely sure that he was locked by the Golden God Ministry.

"It seems that I have killed too many emperors on the side of the Golden God Department, which has attracted their attention, and they want to kill me this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!!

A figure came across the void, its gaze locked on him.

It's an emperor!

"Just an emperor!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he thought that the person who came was a number of emperors, and he was going to besiege him!

But just one emperor dared to kill him, it seems that he is very confident in his own strength!

"Wei!"

The copying talent probed the other party's situation, and only knew this one name, and he took a look at some of the top emperor-level on the battlefield of Qinghuan Abyss, and there was no name Wei, this should be an emperor-level who has only been here for a long time!

But it is undeniable that this emperor named Wei is the most powerful emperor he has ever seen.

The physical body is not inferior to him, or even more powerful, and the ultimate will is also stronger than him, as for other aspects, it is impossible to see.

"Kill!"

Wei didn't talk nonsense with Ye Tian at all, he did it directly, and as soon as he made a move, it was a relatively powerful ultimate arcane, second only to the top ultimate arcane!

Ye Tian didn't spare his hand, and directly cast the top ultimate arcane art of the armor of the arrow to protect himself, and also cast the top ultimate arcane of the blade of the arrow, and at the same time killed the dragon with the top ultimate arcane Dapeng technique.

Three top-notch ultimate arcane spells erupted at once, which really shocked the man.

Rumble!!!

Under the blade of Arromu, the attack of the dragon was broken, and the whole person flew upside down, and the set of armor on his body shattered.

In the first encounter, he was at an absolute disadvantage.

"This guy is not only a self-created Ultimate Dao, but also an extremely high level of the Ultimate Dao!"

"Moreover, he can also use three top-notch ultimate arcane arts!"

"Are you sure this guy isn't a clone of a top-level Ancient Demon level existence?"

Wei said with a frightened face.

If Ye Tian's cultivation was high and reached the limit of the emperor level, it would be impossible for him to withstand Ye Tian's blow.

However, even if his combat strength was like Ye Tian, he still had the confidence to kill Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

Wei's body began to shrink, his own body was very tall, dozens of meters of body, but now the ultimate particles in his body began to compress, and his height also increased from dozens of meters weak to more than one meter, but the qi and blood in his body became even stronger.

This is his second form, the multi-particle form, which is also one of the top secret methods of the Golden God Department, and this secret method will not make him unable to break through to the ancient demon level, but it will make it several times more difficult for him to break through.

It is precisely because of this that he has not yet broken through to the Ancient Demon level, but he also has a lot of confidence to break through to the Ancient Demon level, but he wants to wait for the success rate to be almost 100% before choosing to break through!

After all, once the breakthrough fails, it is death!

"You're good at being able to force out my multi-particle form, but you're still going to die here today!"

Wei said coldly.

"And this secret method!"

Ye Tian was also shocked by the multi-particle form of the dragon, and the other party's aura was significantly improved.

"Kill !!!"

The two sides were fighting.

Ye Tian used the blade of Aromu again, but this blow slashed at the opponent's body, leaving only a mark and did not break through the opponent's defense.

But Ye Tian himself was shocked by the other party, and he, who was originally in an absolute advantage, suddenly fell into a decline.

But at this moment, Ye Tian is still not panicking, Wei has hole cards, and he also has his own hole cards! .
